verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.142-144. Every verse read, claims extracted per ENCODING_GRANULARITY.md, then compared against bphs_v2_ch15.py. 14 predictive claims, 14 encoded, 0 gaps.

claims.claim: General introduction to 4th house effects (no predictive content)
4th lord in own house or lagna lord in 4th aspected by benefic -> residential comforts in full degree
5th lord in own house/own Navamsa/exaltation -> comforts of lands, conveyances, houses, musical instruments
10th lord joins 4th lord in angle or trine -> acquire beautiful mansions
Mercury in ascendant + 4th lord is benefic aspected by another benefic -> honoured by relatives
Benefic in 4th + 4th lord exalted + mother indicator strong -> long-living mother
4th lord in angle + Venus in angle + Mercury exalted -> mother will be happy
Sun in 4th + Moon in 9th + Saturn and Mars in 11th -> confers cows and buffaloes (quadrupeds/vehicles)
4th lord + Mars together in 6th or 8th + movable ascendant -> native will be dumb
Lagna lord is benefic + 4th lord in fall or 11th + Venus in 12th -> conveyances in 12th year
Sun in 4th + 4th lord exalted + with Venus -> conveyances in 32nd year
4th lord joins 10th lord in 4th lord's exaltation Navamsa -> conveyances in 42nd year
Exchange between 4th and 11th lords -> conveyances in 12th year
Benefic in 4th / aspects 4th / aspects 4th lord -> happy with conveyances, free from accidents
Malefic replacing benefic -> losses concerning vehicles, severe accidents
